titles.en: When he was told that the Kharijites had crossed the bridge of Nahrawan
When he was told that the Kharijites had crossed the bridge of Nahrawan

segments: وقال (عليه السلام) لمّا عزم على حرب الخوارج وقيل له: إن القوم قد عبروا جسر النهروان
arabic.text: وقال (عليه السلام) لمّا عزم على حرب الخوارج وقيل له: إن القوم قد عبروا جسر النهروان

segments: When Amīr al-mu’minīn showed his intention to fight the Khārijites he was told that they had crossed the bridge of Nahrawan and gone over to the other side. Amīr al-mu’minīn said :
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: When Amīr al-mu’minīn showed his intention to fight the Khārijites he was told that they had crossed the bridge of Nahrawan and gone over to the other side. Amīr al-mu’minīn said :

titles.en: When he was told that the Kharijites had crossed the bridge of Nahrawan

segments: مَصَارِعُهُمْ دُونَ النُّطْفَةِ، وَاللهِ لاَ يُفْلِتُ مِنْهُمْ عَشَرَةٌ، وَلاَ يَهْلِكُ مِنْكُمْ عَشَرَةٌ.
arabic.text: مَصَارِعُهُمْ دُونَ النُّطْفَةِ، وَاللهِ لاَ يُفْلِتُ مِنْهُمْ عَشَرَةٌ، وَلاَ يَهْلِكُ مِنْكُمْ عَشَرَةٌ.

segments: Their falling place is on this side of the river. By Allāh, not even ten of them will survive while from your side not even ten will be killed. [1]
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: Their falling place is on this side of the river. By Allāh, not even ten of them will survive while from your side not even ten will be killed. [1]

titles.en: When he was told that the Kharijites had crossed the bridge of Nahrawan

segments: ما تقدم عند مضيّ ما أشبهه.
arabic.text: ما تقدم عند مضيّ ما أشبهه.

segments: as-Sayyid ar-Raḍī says: In this sermon “nuṭfah” implies the River Euphrates, and for water this is the nicest expression even though water may be much.
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: as-Sayyid ar-Raḍī says: In this sermon “nuṭfah” implies the River Euphrates, and for water this is the nicest expression even though water may be much.

narratorChain.raw: قال الشريف: يعني بالنطفة: ماء النهر، وهي أفصح كناية عن الماء وإن كان كثيراً جماً، وقد أشرنا إلى ذلك في

parts.text: قال الشريف: يعني بالنطفة: ماء النهر، وهي أفصح كناية
عن الماء وإن كان كثيراً جماً، وقد أشرنا إلى ذلك في
